mapper.select:
SELECT s.name AS teacherName, DATE_FORMAT(l.date, '%Y-%m') AS month, IFNULL(s.class_fee, 0) AS singleClassFee, CAST(SUM(CASE lt.type_num WHEN 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SIGNED) AS classCount, IFNULL(s.class_fee, 0) * SUM(CASE lt.type_num WHEN 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS classFeeSubtotal, IFNULL(s.assistant_fee, 0) AS singleAssistantFee, CAST(SUM(CASE lt.type_num WHEN 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SIGNED) AS assistantCount, IFNULL(s.assistant_fee, 0) * SUM(CASE lt.type_num WHEN 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS assistantFeeSubtotal FROM lesson l LEFT JOIN lesson_teacher lt ON lt.lesson_id = l.id LEFT JOIN staff s ON s.id = lt.teacher_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT lesson_id, SUM(dec_lesson_count) AS dec_lesson_count FROM lesson_student GROUP BY lesson_id ) ls ON ls.lesson_id = l.id
lt.teacher_id IS NOT NULL
AND IFNULL(l.deleted, 0) = 0 AND IFNULL(ls.dec_lesson_count, 0) > 0
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.name}, '%')
AND l.date >= DATE(#{condition.startTime})
AND l.date <= DATE(#{condition.endTime})
GROUP BY lt.teacher_id, s.name, DATE_FORMAT(l.date, '%Y-%m'), s.class_fee, s.assistant_fee HAVING SUM(CASE lt.type_num WHEN 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 OR SUM(CASE lt.type_num WHEN 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY month DESC, teacherName ASC
